title: Farmer Opinion Tracker for England: October 2024
body: "Results of the October 2024 Farmer Opinion Tracker. This statistics notice provides a snapshot of views and opinions towards Defra’s vision for farming taken in October 2024. Farmers were asked a series of questions about Defra’s vision for farming, business planning, relationships with farming groups and Defra and the future of farming. All survey respondents also had the opportunity to provide additional comments.  Farmer Opinion Tracker datasets and time series containing data from September 2019.  Next update: see the statistics release calendar.   For further information contact:  Social Research - Future Farming Insights and Evaluation - Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs farming.research@defra.gov.uk  Statistics - Farming Statistics - Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs farming-statistics@defra.gov.uk  Telephone: 03000 600 170  "
